impact: `npm audit --prefix infra --omit=dev` reports GHSA-jxxr-4gwj-5jf2 for `brace-expansion` bundled under `aws-cdk-lib@2.257.0`. `npm audit fix --prefix infra` cannot remediate it automatically because the vulnerable package is bundled by aws-cdk-lib, so remediation requires an upstream CDK update or explicit dependency decision. This affects infrastructure tooling, not deployed Lambda application code.
title: Infra npm audit flags bundled aws-cdk-lib brace-expansion advisory
